title: Carnotaurus on Volcano Slopes Coloring Page

funFacts: Carnotaurus was a uniquely horn-faced theropod that lived in South America during the Late Cretaceous period.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing color harmony and edge precision using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about prehistoric animal anatomy while developing fine motor coordination.
